title: Secret Crisis (Crisis Pack)
description: A palladium addon that adds superpowers from DC and Marvel!
body:
Secret Crisis (Crisis Pack)


A Palladium addon that adds superpowers from Marvel and DC. 

Available Powers as of v1.1.2

Genetic (Powers you can spawn with or be reborn with)
- human
- asgardian
- kryptonian
- martian

Enhanced (Powers you can make [chance based])
- supersoldier
- speedforce
- negative speedforce
- abomination
- hulk

Equipped (Powers you can wear/use as weapons)
- ironman mark 1
- ironman mark 2
- ironman mark 3
- ironman mark 4
- ironman mark 5
- ironman mark 6
- batman's gadgets
- mjolnir

Join our Discord Server for more information!
